title: Birla Mandir, Shahad
tagline: Birla Mandir, Shahad — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Birla Mandir is a Hindu temple of Lord Vithoba in Shahad, Ulhasnagar taluka, Thane district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Birla Mandir is a Hindu temple of Lord Vithoba in Shahad, Ulhasnagar taluka, Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is famous for its scenery and architecture. Bollywood films like Suhaag (1979), Tere Naam, Prem Granth, Golmaal: Fun Unlimited (2006), etc. has filmed at the temple.

topPlaces.name: Shahad
topPlaces.description: Shahad is a town in the Thane district in Maharashtra state in India. It is located 60 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Mohone
topPlaces.description: Mohone is the name of a little town which falls under the Thane district of Maharashtra. It belongs to the Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Ambivli
topPlaces.description: Mohone is a small town, around 60 kilometres North-East of Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Vithalwadi
topPlaces.description: Vithalwadi is a town in the Taluka of Kalyan Thane district. Vithalwadi is between Kalyan and Ulhasnagar.

topPlaces.name: Ulhasnagar
topPlaces.description: Ulhasnagar is a city located 26 km from Thane City in Thane district, Maharashtra, India. This city is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region managed by the MMRDA. It had an estimated population of 506,098 at the 2011 Census.

topPlaces.name: Kalyan-Dombivli
topPlaces.description: Kalyan-Dombivli is a twin city and it comes under Mumbai Metropolitan Region and it is a municipal corporation with its headquarters located in Kalyan in Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It was formed in 1982 to administer the twin townships of Kalyan and Dombivli.

topPlaces.name: Kalyan
topPlaces.description: Kalyan (Pronunciation: [kəljaːɳ]) is a city on the banks of Ulhas River in Thane district of Maharashtra state in Konkan division. It is governed by Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Electric Loco Shed, Kalyan
topPlaces.description: Electric Loco Shed, Kalyan is an electric engine shed located in Kalyan in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Located north-east of Kalyan Junction railway station, it falls under the Mumbai CR railway division.

items.note: Shahad is a town in the Thane district in Maharashtra state in India. It is located 60 km from Mumbai.
Mohone is the name of a little town which falls under the Thane district of Maharashtra. It belongs to the Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation.
Mohone is a small town, around 60 kilometres North-East of Mumbai.
Vithalwadi is a town in the Taluka of Kalyan Thane district. Vithalwadi is between Kalyan and Ulhasnagar.

Ulhasnagar is a city located 26 km from Thane City in Thane district, Maharashtra, India. This city is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region managed by the MMRDA. It had an estimated population of 506,098 at the 2011 Census.

Kalyan-Dombivli is a twin city and it comes under Mumbai Metropolitan Region and it is a municipal corporation with its headquarters located in Kalyan in Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It was formed in 1982 to administer the twin townships of Kalyan and Dombivli.
Kalyan (Pronunciation: [kəljaːɳ]) is a city on the banks of Ulhas River in Thane district of Maharashtra state in Konkan division. It is governed by Kalyan-Dombivli Municipal Corporation.

Electric Loco Shed, Kalyan is an electric engine shed located in Kalyan in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Located north-east of Kalyan Junction railway station, it falls under the Mumbai CR railway division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Birla Mandir, Shahad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Birla Mandir, Shahad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Birla Mandir, Shahad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (36 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Birla Mandir, Shahad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Birla Mandir, Shahad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Birla Mandir, Shahad?
faq.a: Stays in Birla Mandir, Shahad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Birla Mandir, Shahad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shahad, Mohone, Ambivli, Vithalwadi, Ulhasnagar.
